## Summary

-

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm check`
- [ ] `pnpm build` when production bundling or dependencies changed
- [ ] E2E tests when browser workflows changed

## Documentation

- [ ] Product or API behavior changes are reflected in `docs/spec/`
- [ ] Schema changes are reflected in `docs/domain/data-model.md`
- [ ] New environment variables are documented in `.env.example`

## Security And Compliance

- [ ] No secrets, signing material, or connection strings are committed
- [ ] Critical audit/WORM logging remains intact
